00:00:12 Bob: Thanks Alice, I have a quick update on the backend.

00:00:30 Carol: Great, I'll start QA testing this afternoon.

00:01:15 From David to Everyone: It's a token refresh issue, I'll fix it today.
00:01:30 Bob: Sounds good, we can review it in tomorrow's standup.
